problem.title: The Swiss YPV Is Possible — But Easy to Get Wrong
problem.body: Most applicants from Asia struggle because they don't know the exact requirements, submit incomplete documents, or apply to the wrong canton. A single mistake can mean months of delays or outright rejection.
problem.promise_title: One webinar can save you months of confusion
problem.promise_body: Our specialist-led webinar walks you through the exact steps that lead to approval — tailored for applicants from Indonesia, China, and other Asian countries.

eligibility_teaser.title: Is This Visa Right for You?
eligibility_teaser.subtitle: The Swiss YPV is designed for young professionals who meet these criteria:
eligibility_teaser.age: Aged 18–35 (age range varies by passport country)
eligibility_teaser.passport: Holds a passport from an eligible partner country
eligibility_teaser.education: Completed vocational training or holds a university degree
eligibility_teaser.interest: Intends to work in their field of study in Switzerland
eligibility_teaser.note: Not sure? Our 3-minute pre-screening will tell you instantly.

about.title: What You'll Learn in the Webinar

points.eligibility: Exactly which documents Swiss authorities require

process.title: How It Works
process.step1_desc: Answer a few questions about your background. Takes 3 minutes.

process.step3_desc: Eligible applicants can book a seat and receive personalised step-by-step guidance.

host.title: Your Guide Through the Process
host.name: YPV Switzerland Advisors
host.bio: Our advisors have helped young professionals from Indonesia, China, the Philippines, and other Asian countries navigate the Swiss Young Professional Visa program. We know the pitfalls, the paperwork, and what Swiss authorities look for — so you don't have to figure it out alone.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What is the Swiss Young Professional Visa?
faq.a1: The Swiss Young Professional Visa (YPV) is a permit that allows qualified young professionals from eligible non-EU countries to live and work in Switzerland for up to 18 months, gaining international career experience in their field.
faq.a2: Eligible countries include Indonesia, China, the Philippines, and several other nations. Use our free pre-screening to check your specific passport country instantly.
faq.q3: How much does the webinar cost?
faq.a3: Webinar fee details are provided after you complete the free pre-screening and receive your eligibility result. There is no cost to check your eligibility.
faq.q4: What if I'm not eligible right now?
faq.a4: We'll explain exactly why, and what could change your eligibility in the future. The pre-screening is always free and takes only 3 minutes.
faq.q5: Is this a guaranteed visa service?
faq.a5: No. We provide expert guidance and education — final visa decisions rest entirely with Swiss authorities. We help you build the strongest possible application.

cta_section.title: Ready to Find Out If You Qualify?
cta_section.body: The pre-screening is free, takes 3 minutes, and gives you an instant result.

rejection.title: Unfortunately, You Don't Qualify at This Time
rejection.subtitle: Thank you for your interest in the Swiss Young Professional Visa program.
rejection.country_not_eligible: We're sorry — your passport country ({country}) is not currently eligible for the Swiss Young Professional Visa program. The program is only open to nationals of specific partner countries.
rejection.age_out_of_range: We're sorry — the Swiss Young Professional Visa has an age requirement of {min}–{max} years for {country} passport holders. Based on your date of birth, you are currently {age} years old.
rejection.vocational_training_required: We're sorry — the Swiss Young Professional Visa requires applicants to have completed vocational training or a university degree. This is a mandatory requirement of the Swiss authorities.
rejection.field_interest_required: We're sorry — the program requires participants to have a genuine interest in working in their field of study or training in Switzerland.
rejection.encouragement: Immigration programs evolve. If your circumstances change, we encourage you to re-apply in the future.
rejection.contact: If you believe this assessment is incorrect, please contact us.

success.title: Congratulations — You're Eligible!
success.subtitle: Please review your payment instructions below to secure your place.
success.eligible_message: You have passed our initial eligibility check for the Swiss Young Professional Visa webinar.
success.payment_intro: To secure your place, please transfer the webinar fee to the following Wise account:
success.next_steps: Once your payment is verified by our team, you will receive the Zoom link to join the webinar. Please allow 1–2 business days for payment verification.
success.contact: For questions, reply to the confirmation email or contact us at {email}.
success.check_email: A confirmation email with these details has been sent to {email}.

footer.screening_note: Pre-screening results are indicative only and do not constitute visa approval.
